productDisplayName: Aspen Women Mother Of Pearl Dial Watch
description: Whether or not you make it to the slopes this year, this timepiece from aspen captures the spirit and beauty of a mountain side covered in pristine snow. Luxury watchmakers Aspen have used the most precise technology and the most exquisite materials to create stylish watches perfect for the sophisticated you. Case diameter: 34 mm Case thickness: 5 mm Dial shape: Rectangle Warranty: Two Years Stainless steel rectangle case Stainless steel strap with a interlaced design and a single press clasp Mother of pearl dial with metallic hands Branding at the 12 hour mark Screw to reset time Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 30 meters, allowing you to use it even when showering or in light rain
